title: [BUG] Sheets containing multiple printing areas are not correctly serialized
author: peterkooijmans
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is. -->

Lib version: 4.1.1

## Steps To Reproduce

<!-- The exact steps required to reproduce the issue, ideally with a code example -->

- In Excel, create two printing areas on the same sheet
- Load the workbook using this library and then immediately write it back to a different file
- Load the newly written workbook in Excel. Notice that there is only 1 printing area.

## The expected behaviour:

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen. -->

Loading and immediately saving a workbook should not lose printing areas.

## Possible solution (optional, but very helpful):

I'm preparing a PR to fix this.
